title: Prevent identifier labels from wrapping in IdentifierDisplay
description:
As a dashboard user, I want identifier labels with spaces to stay on one line, so that the identifier list remains tidy and readable.

Feature: IdentifierDisplay label layout

Scenario: Identifier labels do not wrap
  Given an identifier name contains spaces (e.g., "Report Id")
  When IdentifierDisplay renders in full mode
  Then the label text does not wrap onto multiple lines

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting fix. Plan: prevent label wrapping in IdentifierDisplay full mode and add a regression test.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Done. Added whitespace-nowrap to identifier labels in IdentifierDisplay and added regression test. Tests: 
> aws-amplify-gen2@0.1.0 test
> jest identifier-display.test.tsx
